mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in non-farm payrolls indicates a robust labor market, supporting consumer spending and corporate earnings, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 55% of periods where PAYEMS shows positive month-over-month growth.

mechanism_narrative: An unexpected acceleration in consumer price inflation above a critical threshold signals potential erosion of purchasing power and corporate margins, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns as investors anticipate tighter monetary policy.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of instances where the CPIAUCSL trigger condition is met.

mechanism_narrative: Robust retail sales growth combined with a high federal funds rate indicates a strong economy that can withstand restrictive monetary policy, suggesting continued corporate profitability and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day forward returns are negative in more than 45% of periods where both RSAFS growth and high FEDFUNDS conditions are met.

mechanism_narrative: A significant increase in the unemployment rate above its recent low signals a deteriorating labor market and potential economic contraction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns as earnings expectations decline over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 40% of instances where UNRATE shows a significant increase during a confirmed recession.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained high level of housing starts indicates strong consumer confidence and investment in real estate, which typically precedes broader economic growth and supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of periods where HOUST remains above the specified threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent growth in industrial production reflects healthy manufacturing and mining sectors, indicating robust business activity and demand, which translates into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 55% of periods where INDPRO shows positive month-over-month growth.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate sustained above a critical level signals a restrictive monetary policy stance, increasing borrowing costs for corporations and consumers, which typically leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of instances where FEDFUNDS remains above 5.0% for at least three consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth combined with a low unemployment rate indicates a robust and efficient economy, fostering high corporate profits and investor confidence, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day forward returns are negative in more than 40% of periods where both GDP growth and low unemployment conditions are met.
